name: Easy Turkey Sloppy Joes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a non-stick skillet or spray a regular skillet with non-stick spray.
2. Add the ground turkey and diced onion to the skillet and cook until the meat is no longer pink, stirring occasionally.
3. Stir in the catsup, Dijon mustard, seasoning salt, and garlic powder.
4. Simmer the mixture gently until it thickens to your desired consistency, about 10-15 minutes.
5. Serve the turkey sloppy joe mixture on split sandwich rolls.
This recipe is easy, quick, and low calorie!
